find_definition: find the definition of a symbol at a given line and column in a source file
find_references: find all references to a symbol at a given cursor position in a source file
hover_symbol: get hover information for a symbol at a given line and column in a source file
get_diagnostics: get compiler and linter diagnostics for a source file using the language server
list_document_symbols: list all symbols in a source file with their kinds and line numbers
